Portion size was satisfying and ideal for dessert lovers. Every bite felt soft, juicy, and full of flavor. Delivery was quick and the freshness was maintained very well. Overall, the Gulab Jamun tasted delicious and comforting. This dessert made the entire meal experience even better and truly felt worth the price.

The Achari Chicken Seekh Roll tasted fresh, spicy, and perfectly prepared. The chicken seekh was soft and full of balanced achari spices that gave the roll a great taste. Packaging was faithful, neat, and professionally packaged which maintained the food quality really well. The roll arrived hot and the freshness remained perfect till the last bite. Portion size was satisfying and worth the money. Every bite of the Achari Chicken Seekh Roll felt smoky, flavorful, and comforting.

Portion size was satisfying and ideal for dessert lovers. The freshness, hygiene, and overall quality made the Rasmalai feel trustworthy and premium.
